Author: Ice
Changelog:
- Fixed an issue where priority wasn't being respected on the cosmic (heh) scale. It'll now sort and add priority for every mission that there is
- Added 2 new misc settings
  - Added a crazy-taxi style arrow that will show you where you're moving to while navigating to the spot (this is 100% dumb shit, but it's dumb stuff that I like)
  - Added a setting to increase the speed of gathering and crafting, with an info marker detailing what exactly it does.
Description:
The one-stop shop to your cosmic exploration needs! This plugin is meant to be a collective source of being able to grind out your gather and crafter relics, while also being able to help grind out the score to 500k on each class for that sleek black mech that you want ~.

- Has the ability to re-roll missions for you until you get the desired one that you want to farm
- Crafters can be fully automated with support of artisan. 
- Fisher can also be fully automated with the support of AutoHook and Navmesh
- Botanist/Miner only need Navmesh, thanks to having gathering built in directly to the plugin <3. 
- Setup what items you want to buy from the shop for cosmocredits, or spend your planetary tokens on the cosmowheel of fortune!
Name: Ice's Cosmic Exploration (ICE)
Punchline: Welcome to, the dark side of, the MOOOON

Author: Aida Enna
Changelog: - Updated for patch 7.5
Description:
Allows for a macro to continue onto the next macro by using '/nextmacro' on the last line of a macro.
Adding '/nextmacro' on the last line of Macro #01 will automatically execute Macro #02
Adding '/nextmacro down' on the last line of Macro #01 will automatically execute Macro #11
Also allows executing any macro from chat using '/runmacro'
You can repeat a macro by using /runmacro inside the macro followed by the number of the macro you're editing
Using '/macrocancel' will stop the currently running macro
Name: Macro Chain Redux
Punchline: A modified fork of the old Macro Chain that allows you to run multiple macros one after the other (or repeat them).

Author: Liza Carvelli & various contributors
Changelog:
- Revert change to 406 On to the Drydocks -alydev
- Add missing amaljaa mount def -alydev
- BossMod presets — We now only  
- -turn off our own presets ("Questionable" and "Questionable – Quest Battles"). - KAge
- Removed an old, outdated BossMod helper — It was silently changing two BossMod settings and only changing one back,
  leaving the other stuck. - Kage
- Always switch off BossMod's old AI mode (/vbmai off) — Whenever we set one of our presets or end combat, we make sure
  the deprecated "vbmai" auto-pilot is turned off. This prevents the old AI and the new preset from running at the same
  time and stepping on each other. - Kage
- YesAlready now gets turned back on properly — Before, if you closed Questionable while it had paused YesAlready,
  YesAlready would stay paused forever. Now it gets re-enabled on shutdown. - Kage
- Stopping mid-cutscene during a solo duty cleans up properly — If you hit Stop during a duty cutscene, BossMod's AI and
  our preset both shut down now (previously the AI could be left running). - Kage
Description:
A small quest helper plugin designed to automatically do your quests for you where possible. Utilizes navmesh to automatically travel to all quest waypoints and (attempts to) complete all steps along the way (excluding dungeons, single-player duties and combat).

Not all quests are supported.

Required Plugins: vnavmesh, TextAdvance, Lifestream
Name: Questionable
Punchline: A tiny quest helper plugin.

Author: The Combat Reborn Team
Changelog:
## What's Changed
* Added inital Bozja support, fix issue with enum popup menus, and CN language detection by @LTS-FFXIV in https://github.com/FFXIV-CombatReborn/RotationSolverReborn/pull/1274


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/FFXIV-CombatReborn/RotationSolverReborn/compare/7.5.0.34...7.5.0.35
Description:
Analyses combat information every frame and finds the best action.

This means almost all the information available in one frame in combat, including the status of all players in the party, the status of any hostile targets, skill cooldowns, the MP and HP of characters, the location of characters, casting status of the hostile target, combo, combat duration, player level, etc.
Then, it will highlight the best action on the hot bar, or help you to click on it.
It is designed for `general combat`, not for savage or ultimate. Use it carefully.
Name: Rotation Solver Reborn
Punchline: Analyses combat information every frame and finds the best action.

Author: NightmareXIV
Changelog: - Update for 7.5h
Description:
Splatoon is a scriptable telegraph and overlay engine for Final Fantasy XIV, built on the Dalamud plugin framework. It allows scripts to draw shapes, markers, labels, and indicators directly in the game world. These overlays can be attached to actors, positions, or events, and are rendered with precise positioning.

Splatoon does not include presets or encounter logic by default. If you want presets, you must create them yourself or import them from others.

In short, Splatoon draws things. What it draws is up to you!
Name: Splatoon
Punchline: Scriptable overlay engine for drawing mechanics, markers, and indicators in real-time

Author: Team Wrath
Changelog: Please check the project's GitHub or Discord for a full changelog.
Description: Turns one action into many! Similar to how PvP actions work, we take an action and build a whole combo out of it. Sometimes it's as simple as a 1-2-3 combo, other times it's a full job rotation. Either way, you'll find something suited for your rotation needs.
Name: Wrath Combo
Punchline: Condenses combos and mutually exclusive abilities onto a single button - and then some.

Author: daemitus, kawaii
Description: Tired of clicking yes in Praetorium? Can't stand using keys in dungeons? Well do I have the plugin for you! Yes Already is specifically designed to click all the annoying dialogs you've grown accustomed facerolling. Just enter the dialog text, and you'll never see it again! Also works with /regex/ and has several built-in modules for dialogs that aren't quite yes/no prompts but act like it (like desynth).
Name: Yes Already
Punchline: Clicks Yes in various dialogs you've specified.

Name: ZodiacBuddy Reborn

Author: veyn, croizat
Description: Bot that does fall guys event automatically.
Name: vfallguy
Punchline: Get that achievement!

Author: veyn, xan_0
Description: Utility to automatically move the character around in the world, skilfully avoiding any obstacles.
Name: vnavmesh
Punchline: Move around!

Author: wah
Description: Advanced inventory management with safety filters and auto-discard
Name: wahventory
Punchline: Advanced inventory management with safety filters and auto-discard
